fields.description:
## Context / Problem
The automated-quality audit found approved maintainability ratchets that cannot be enabled wholesale without first accounting for existing diagnostics. This epic stages blocking enforcement for function complexity, four safe Mypy settings, Ruff ASYNC/DTZ, and Ruff RUF hygiene. It explicitly defers disallow_any_generics, disallow_untyped_defs, Ruff security-family S rules, and Semgrep expansion.

## Approach
Deliver independently reviewed stories into a short-lived Gerrit feature branch, then merge the completed branch atomically to main. Stories that edit pyproject.toml execute in this order: d9f5-baa5-9fc3-451d, then 28cd-d8f8-4456-482c, then 125d-ee6f-7af0-4200. The 28cd story creates and owns tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py; 125d depends on 28cd and extends that file. The complexity story does not share pyproject.toml and may proceed independently when next-batch reports no file-impact conflict.

Rejected: one large cleanup change, because it would mix distinct tools, obscure regressions, and make rollback difficult.

## Child Decomposition
- c9f7-d6df-bce0-4b77: add a symbol-level shrink-only C901 baseline at threshold 15 and wire it into the canonical lint gate.
- d9f5-baa5-9fc3-451d: enable no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores after revalidating the measured diagnostics.
- 28cd-d8f8-4456-482c: make the three DTZ sites timezone-explicit, enable ASYNC/DTZ, create the shared Ruff ratchet test, and run the integration pytest tier.
- 125d-ee6f-7af0-4200: clear RUF100 and other approved RUF diagnostics, extend the shared Ruff ratchet test, and continue to defer RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003.

## Verification Checkpoints
After each story, its focused commands and Gerrit labels are recorded on that child ticket. After all children merge to the server-side feature branch, the integration worktree runs each command in the Acceptance Criteria independently.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every direct child is closed; rebar list-descendants facb-44c3-2ada-41ee --output json reports no open or in_progress direct child.
- [ ] make lint exits 0 from the integrated feature worktree.
- [ ] make typecheck exits 0 from the integrated feature worktree.
- [ ] config-check exits 0 from the integrated feature worktree.
- [ ] pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q exits 0 from the integrated feature worktree.
- [ ] pytest -m integration -q exits 0 from the integrated feature worktree.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Every story change has LLM-Review +1 in Gerrit.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Every story change has Verified +1 in Gerrit.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Every story change has zero unresolved Gerrit comments.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The final no-ff merge-back change has LLM-Review +1 in Gerrit.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The final no-ff merge-back change has Verified +1 in Gerrit.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The final no-ff merge-back change has zero unresolved Gerrit comments.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The final no-ff merge-back change is submitted to main.
- [ ] After fetching origin, git merge-base --is-ancestor for every child rebar-ticket commit against origin/main exits 0.
